emittedEvidence.summary:
For **1792 Single Barrel Bourbon**, the strongest web evidence supports this as an **official Barton 1792 Distillery / 1792 Bourbon release**, not a separate non-Barton bottling. The official 1792 product page identifies it as **“Single Barrel”**, labels it **“Limited Edition,”** gives the strength as **46.85% ABV / 93.7 proof**, and states it is **“Distilled and Bottled by the Barton 1792 Distillery, Bardstown, KY.”** ([1792bourbon.com](https://1792bourbon.com/single-barrel?utm_source=openai))

An independent source, **Distiller**, also lists **1792 Single Barrel Bourbon** under the 1792 bran
